SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

This Shareholders Agreement (the "SHA") is entered into on this 5th day of November, 2023, by and among the following parties:

1. Mr. Tan Wei Ming, NRIC No. S2345678B, residing at 123 Fictional Road, Singapore 123456, and contactable at +65 6123 4567 or via email at wei.ming@fictionalmail.sg.

2. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, NRIC No. S3456789C, residing at 456 Imaginary Avenue, Singapore 654321, with email contact siti.aishah@imaginary.sg.

3. Dr. Ramasamy Muthu, NRIC No. S4567890D, residing at 789 Mythical Drive, Singapore 789012, reachable at +65 6234 5678.

Company: FutureTech Innovations Pte. Ltd., UEN: 202312345G, registered office at 101 Futuristic Lane, Singapore 098765.

WHEREAS, the parties have agreed to contribute capital in the sum of SGD 500,000 (the "Investment") for the purposes set forth herein.

The parties agree to abide by the SHA and any subsequent amendments that may arise. Note that the project plan is not a reflection of current project status, and any adjustments shall be communicated in writing.

For further reference, visit https://example.sg/user/S6789123F where specific terms related to this SHA can be accessed.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first written above.
